differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) syndrome with metastatic infection
Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Histoplasmosis or Blastomycosis)
Disseminated malignancy (e.g., metastatic adenocarcinoma with paraneoplastic or septic sequelae)
next_steps: Perform immediate diagnostic vitrectomy and aqueous humor aspiration for culture and PCR
Obtain transesophageal echocardiography to rule out occult endocarditis
Blood and sputum cultures for aerobic, anaerobic, fungal, and mycobacterial organisms
Perform fine-needle aspiration or biopsy of the liver mass
Infectious disease and ophthalmology consultation for surgical evaluation of the right eye
Aggressive antimicrobial coverage with susceptibility testing, specifically for hvKP-related strains
